announce_text: NTC executives have reached an agreement with TRU officials, we are now authorized to enter the Turkenden-3 Exclusionary Zone. Most of the region is desolate, most if not all residents and personnel should've evacuated from the region. Deploy the dropship to the market & joint medical-research spaceport at the southwest or the military spaceport in the northeast. NTF, gear up and prepare to deploy!
